name: LSA Secrets & NTLM Hash Config
categoryDescription: Security policy configuration, local user accounts, audit settings, and authentication configuration.
description: LSA configuration — NoLMHash, LMCompatibilityLevel, and Security Packages.
forensic_value: NoLMHash=0 means LM hashes stored (trivially crackable). Low LMCompatibilityLevel allows NTLM downgrade. Secrets key holds encrypted service credentials.
